## Summary

<!-- What changed, why, and which issue does it close? -->

Closes #

## User impact

<!-- Describe observable behavior, compatibility, and affected workflows. -->

## Risk areas

- [ ] RF mathematics, units, conventions, or solver semantics
- [ ] URL state, preferences, history, or exported metadata
- [ ] Chart geometry, pointer, touch, or keyboard interaction
- [ ] Accessibility, responsive layout, motion, or forced colors
- [ ] Export, print, service worker, offline, or runtime network boundary
- [ ] Dependencies, licenses, automation, or deployment
- [ ] None of the above

## Verification

<!-- Paste exact commands and concise results. -->

- [ ] `bun run ci`
- [ ] Relevant desktop and mobile Playwright projects
- [ ] `bun run verify:docs`
- [ ] Screenshots or visual snapshots reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] RF docs, equation assertions, fixtures, and properties updated when math changed
- [ ] Accessibility names, states, focus, text equivalents, reflow, and motion considered
- [ ] Offline, export, and no-runtime-network behavior considered
- [ ] Dependency licenses/notices reviewed when lockfile changed
- [ ] ADR added or linked for durable architecture decisions
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible behavior
